title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates:
Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates!
